ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "granularity_time" TEXT /* Time granularity of the data (e.g., total, weekly) */,
  "granularity_geo" TEXT /* Geographic granularity of the data (e.g., nation, region) */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location */,
  "border_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the border identifier */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the year */,
  "yrwk" TEXT /* Year and week in the format YYYY-WW */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "x" INTEGER /* Placeholder column for additional data (if any) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of occurrences (e.g., deaths) */,
  "date_of_publishing" TEXT /* Date of data publishing */,
  "tag_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outcome tag */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the cause of death */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for the given location and time period */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is estimated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital, census) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_border_id FOREIGN KEY ("border_id") REFERENCES borders ("border_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_tag_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_outcome_id") REFERENCES tag_outcomes ("tag_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., nation, region, city) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "last_population_update" TEXT /* Date when the population data was last updated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-39, 90+) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., male, female) */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sex is binary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1899/1900) */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borders" (
  "border_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each border */,
  "border_name" TEXT /* Name of the border (e.g., 2020) */,
  "border_description" TEXT /* Description of the border */,
  "border_type" TEXT /* Type of border (e.g., administrative, natural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("border_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_outcomes" (
  "tag_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome tag */,
  "tag_outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., death) */,
  "tag_outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the outcome data is confidential */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the outcome (e.g., vital statistics, health outcomes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
